2604.27996.title: Exploring Interaction Paradigms for LLM Agents in Scientific Visualization
2604.27996.paper_summary: This paper examines how different types of large language model (LLM) agents perform on scientific visualization (SciVis) tasks, where users generate visualization workflows from natural-language instructions. We compare three primary interaction paradigms, including domain-specific agents with structured tool use, computer-use agents, and general-purpose coding agents, by evaluating eight representative agents across 15 benchmark tasks and measuring visualization quality, efficiency, robustness, and computational cost. We further analyze interaction modalities, including code scripts and model context protocol (MCP) or API calls for structured tool use, as well as command-line interfaces (CLI) and graphical user interfaces (GUI) for more general interaction, while additionally studying the effect of persistent memory in selected agents. The results reveal clear tradeoffs across paradigms and modalities. General-purpose coding agents achieve the highest task success rates but are computationally expensive, while domain-specific agents are more efficient and stable but less flexible. Computer-use agents perform well on individual steps but struggle with longer multi-step workflows, indicating that long-horizon planning is their primary limitation. Across both CLI- and GUI-based settings, persistent memory improves performance over repeated trials, although its benefits depend on the underlying interaction mode and the quality of feedback. These findings suggest that no single approach is sufficient, and future SciVis systems should combine structured tool use, interactive capabilities, and adaptive memory mechanisms to balance performance, robustness, and flexibility.
2604.27996.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文探討不同類型的大型語言模型 (LLM) 代理在科學視覺化 (SciVis) 任務中的表現，使用者從自然語言指令生成視覺化工作流程。<lb/>我們比較三種主要的互動範式，包括具有結構化工具使用的領域特定代理、計算機使用代理，以及通用編碼代理，通過評估八個代表性代理在 15 個基準任務中的表現，並測量視覺化質量、效率、穩定性和計算成本。<lb/>我們進一步分析互動模式，包括用於結構化工具使用的代碼腳本和模型上下文協議 (MCP) 或 API 調用，以及用於更一般互動的命令行界面 (CLI) 和圖形用戶界面 (GUI)，同時還研究了在選定代理中持久記憶的影響。<lb/>結果顯示不同範式和模式之間存在明顯的權衡。<lb/>通用編碼代理達到最高的任務成功率，但計算成本高昂，而領域特定代理則更高效且穩定，但靈活性較差。<lb/>計算機使用代理在單個步驟上表現良好，但在較長的多步驟工作流程中表現不佳，這表明長期規劃是它們的主要限制。<lb/>在 CLI 和 GUI 基礎的設置中，持久記憶在重複試驗中改善了性能，儘管其好處取決於基礎的互動模式和反饋的質量。<lb/>這些發現表明，沒有單一的方法是足夠的，未來的 SciVis 系統應該結合結構化工具使用、互動能力和自適應記憶機制，以平衡性能、穩定性和靈活性。
2604.27996.author: Jackson Vonderhorst et.al.
2604.27996.authors: Jackson Vonderhorst, Kuangshi Ai, Haichao Miao, Shusen Liu, Chaoli Wang
